Theme: SE-Infographic / The High-Value Consulting Proposal Framework 2026
Title: The $50K Consulting Proposal Framework | 7 Sections That Close Deals 2026
Description: Save this for your freelance tech consulting and high-value sales board. Most developers lose high-value consulting deals because they submit developer proposals — feature lists, sprint estimates, hourly rates. Decision-makers buy business outcomes, not features. This 7-section framework restructures your proposal to speak to CFOs and CEOs. The result: average contract values 3x higher than hourly-rate proposals for equivalent work. Save this before your next proposal. #TechConsulting #ProposalWriting #FreelanceDev #HighValueSales #FractionalCTO #ClientAcquisition #BuildInPublic
Alt Text: Dark editorial infographic showing 7-section consulting proposal framework with business language emphasis, deep charcoal background with amber-gold section numbering, each section labeled with purpose and example language, clean Outfit typography
AI Prompt: Clean editorial infographic, 9:16 vertical, Style B Dynamic Viral. Background: deep charcoal (#0d0d1a). Title in bold white: THE HIGH-VALUE CONSULTING PROPOSAL — 7 Sections That Close Deals. Subtitle in amber: Stop writing developer proposals. Write business transformation proposals. Below, 7 numbered sections stacked vertically, each with amber numbering and a brief purpose note: 01. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY — One page. What business problem you solve. Not what you build. 02. CURRENT STATE ANALYSIS — Their specific pain points, quantified where possible (e.g., 'Current checkout abandonment: 23%'). 03. PROPOSED SOLUTION — Business outcomes first. Technology details last. 04. MEASURABLE SUCCESS CRITERIA — 3 KPIs that define project success. Make these their words, not yours. 05. ENGAGEMENT MODEL — Timeline, checkpoints, communication cadence. Shows you've done this before. 06. INVESTMENT — Value-based pricing tied to outcome ROI. Never hourly rate. 07. NEXT STEPS — Single, clear action. 'Reply to schedule a 30-minute alignment call.' Footer in amber: Proposals that speak to business outcomes close at 3x the rate of feature-list proposals. Colour: dark navy-charcoal, amber, white. No photography.
